setup_task.sh script explicitly creates and deploys to the "sales-prod" namespace.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Kubernetes environment data. The target namespace "sales-prod", target pod "order-processor", target secret "fault-signature-hotfix", and pass threshold of 75 all exactly match the setup and verifier scripts.
